text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The "GPT-5 System Card" is a real, verifiable document published by OpenAI in August 2025, available at the exact cited URL (cdn.openai.com/gpt-5-system-card.pdf) and also indexed on arXiv (arXiv:2601.03267) under the title "OpenAI GPT-5 System Card." The authorship as "OpenAI" is consistent with the large-team collaborative nature of the document. Its absence from standard academic databases is expected for a technical report of this type.
LINK: https://cdn.openai.com/gpt-5-system-card.pdf
